channel.title: CityWeather - Hyperlocal Weather Forecasts
channel.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for cities and neighborhoods worldwide. Real-time weather data for NYC, London, Tokyo, Paris and 60+ cities.

item.title: New York City Hyperlocal Weather - Neighborhood by Neighborhood
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for NYC neighborhoods including Midtown, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx and Staten Island.

item.title: London Hyperlocal Weather by District
item.description: Detailed hyperlocal weather for London districts including Central London, East End, South London and more.

item.title: Tokyo Hyperlocal Weather by Neighborhood
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Tokyo neighborhoods including Shinjuku, Shibuya, Akihabara and more.

item.title: Paris Hyperlocal Weather by Arrondissement
item.description: Detailed weather forecasts for Paris arrondissements and neighborhoods.

item.title: Weather Near Me - Find Your Local Forecast
item.description: Use your location to find hyperlocal weather forecasts for your exact neighborhood.

item.title: NYC Weather in January - What to Expect
item.description: Complete guide to New York City weather in January - temperatures, precipitation, what to wear.

item.title: Dubai Hyperlocal Weather
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Dubai neighborhoods and districts.

item.title: Sydney Hyperlocal Weather by Suburb
item.description: Hyperlocal weather forecasts for Sydney suburbs and neighborhoods.

item.title: London Weather Guide — Best Time to Visit
item.description: Complete London weather guide: best months to visit, seasonal temperatures, what to pack, and neighborhood climate tips.

item.title: Tokyo Weather Guide — Best Time to Visit
item.description: Complete Tokyo weather guide: cherry blossom season, rainy season, typhoon season and the best months to visit Japan.

item.title: Paris Weather Guide — Best Time to Visit
item.description: Paris weather by month: spring in Paris, summer heat waves, fall foliage and winter markets guide.

item.title: Dubai Weather Guide — Best Time to Visit
item.description: Dubai weather guide: when to avoid the extreme summer heat and the best cool-season months to visit.

item.title: Sydney Weather Guide — Best Time to Visit
item.description: Sydney weather guide: the best months to visit Australia — from beach season to mild autumn and winter.

item.title: NYC Weather in March — Spring Forecast
item.description: New York City weather in March: temperatures, rainfall, what to pack for early spring in NYC.

item.title: London Weather in March — Spring Conditions
item.description: London weather in March: temperatures, rainfall, and what to expect in early spring in the UK capital.

item.title: Tokyo Weather in March — Cherry Blossom Season
item.description: Tokyo weather in March: cherry blossom season begins, temperatures, and travel tips for spring in Japan.

item.title: Paris Weather in March — Early Spring
item.description: Paris weather in March: spring arrives in the French capital — temperatures, what to wear, and outdoor tips.

item.title: Dubai Weather in March — Ideal Season
item.description: Dubai weather in March: one of the best months to visit with warm but not extreme temperatures.

item.title: Sydney Weather in March — Late Summer
item.description: Sydney weather in March: late summer conditions in Australia — temperatures, humidity, and beach tips.
